heading: Definitions
label: 3982 Definitions
notes: Amendments1988— substituted “part” for “subchapter” in introductory text.Pub. L. 100–4181985— struck out pars. (3), (4), and (5) which defined “Foundation”, “institution of higher education”, and “States”, respectively, and redesignated par. (6) as (3).Pub. L. 99–159
amendments: Amendments1988— substituted “part” for “subchapter” in introductory text.Pub. L. 100–4181985— struck out pars. (3), (4), and (5) which defined “Foundation”, “institution of higher education”, and “States”, respectively, and redesignated par. (6) as (3).Pub. L. 99–159

children.text: the term “applicant” means with respect to activities described in an institution of higher education and the other participants described in paragraph (3) of , and with respect to activities described in a local educational agency and the other participants described in paragraph (3) of ;section 3984(a) of this titlesection 3984(a) of this titlesection 3984(b) of this titlesection 3984(b) of this title

the term “equipment” includes machinery, utilities, and built-in equipment and any necessary enclosures or structures to house them, and includes all other items necessary for the functioning of a particular facility as a facility for the provision of educational services, including items such as instructional equipment and necessary furniture, printed, published, and audio-visual instructional materials, and books, periodicals, documents, and other related materials; and

the term “State agency for higher education” means the State board of higher education or other agency or officer primarily responsible for the State supervision of higher education, or if there is no such officer or agency, an officer or agency designated by the Governor or by State law.
